name: Curried Apple-Walnut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, halve and cut each apple into 24 slices. Do not peel.
2. Combine apples and 1/2 cup lemon juice in a bowl; toss well. Cover and chill.
3. In another bowl, combine remaining lemon juice, celery, walnuts, salt, pepper, curry powder, water, and oil. Stir well. Cover and chill.
4. To serve, line a large serving platter with lettuce leaves. Drain apples and arrange in individual servings on top of the lettuce. Spoon the celery mixture around the apples. (Fat 2, Cholesterol 0.)
